'''鈭歝h-n-v''' ('''chanava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lobbycon|lobbycon]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lobbycon|lobbycon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-n-v
|-
! Lemma
| chanava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chanavithi|chanavithi]] || [[word:chanaviji|chanaviji]] || [[word:chanavishi|chanavishi]] || [[word:chanavi|chanavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chanavuthuth|chanavuthuth]] || [[word:chanavujuj|chanavujuj]] || [[word:chanavushush|chanavushush]] || [[word:chanav|chanav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chanavuthu|chanavuthu]] || [[word:chanavuju|chanavuju]] || [[word:chanavushu|chanavushu]] || [[word:chanavu|chanavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chanavufuth|chanavufuth]] || [[word:chanavufuj|chanavufuj]] || [[word:chanavufush|chanavufush]] || [[word:chanavuf|chanavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chanavethe|chanavethe]] || [[word:chanaveje|chanaveje]] || [[word:chanaveshe|chanaveshe]] || [[word:chanave|chanave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chanavothoth|chanavothoth]] || [[word:chanavojoj|chanavojoj]] || [[word:chanavoshosh|chanavoshosh]] || [[word:chanav|chanav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chanavotho|chanavotho]] || [[word:chanavojo|chanavojo]] || [[word:chanavosho|chanavosho]] || [[word:chanavo|chanavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chanavofoth|chanavofoth]] || [[word:chanavofoj|chanavofoj]] || [[word:chanavofosh|chanavofosh]] || [[word:chanavof|chanavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chanav忙th忙|chanav忙th忙]] || [[word:chanav忙j忙|chanav忙j忙]] || [[word:chanav忙sh忙|chanav忙sh忙]] || [[word:chanav忙|chanav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chanavathath|chanavathath]] || [[word:chanavajaj|chanavajaj]] || [[word:chanavashash|chanavashash]] || [[word:chanav|chanav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chanavatha|chanavatha]] || [[word:chanavaja|chanavaja]] || [[word:chanavasha|chanavasha]] || [[word:chanava|chanava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chanavafath|chanavafath]] || [[word:chanavafaj|chanavafaj]] || [[word:chanavafash|chanavafash]] || [[word:chanavaf|chanavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chanavasha|chanavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochanavasha|gochanavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichanavasha|gokichanavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chanavn眉sha|chanavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochanavnkn眉sha|gochanavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichanavn眉sha|gokichanavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chanavsh毛sha|chanavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochanavnksh毛sha|gochanavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichanavsh毛sha|gokichanavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chanavrosha|chanavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochanavnkrosha|gochanavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichanavrosha|gokichanavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chanavmusha|chanavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochanavnkmusha|gochanavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichanavmusha|gokichanavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chanavsherasha|chanavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochanavnksherasha|gochanavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichanavsherasha|gokichanavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chanavngasha|chanavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochanavnkngasha|gochanavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichanavngasha|gokichanavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chanavyasha|chanavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochanavnkyasha|gochanavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichanavyasha|gokichanavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chanavyamasha|chanavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochanavnkyamasha|gochanavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichanavyamasha|gokichanavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chanavn眉sh毛sha|chanavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochanavnkn眉sh毛sha|gochanavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichanavn眉sh毛sha|gokichanavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chanavn眉rosha|chanavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochanavnkn眉rosha|gochanavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichanavn眉rosha|gokichanavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chanavn眉musha|chanavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochanavnkn眉musha|gochanavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichanavn眉musha|gokichanavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chanavsh毛n眉sha|chanavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochanavnksh毛n眉sha|gochanavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichanavsh毛n眉sha|gokichanavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chanavsh毛rosha|chanavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochanavnksh毛rosha|gochanavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichanavsh毛rosha|gokichanavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chanavsh毛musha|chanavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochanavnksh毛musha|gochanavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichanavsh毛musha|gokichanavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chanavron眉sha|chanavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochanavnkron眉sha|gochanavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichanavron眉sha|gokichanavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chanavrosh毛sha|chanavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochanavnkrosh毛sha|gochanavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichanavrosh毛sha|gokichanavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chanavromusha|chanavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochanavnkromusha|gochanavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichanavromusha|gokichanavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chanavmun眉sha|chanavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochanavnkmun眉sha|gochanavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichanavmun眉sha|gokichanavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chanavmush毛sha|chanavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochanavnkmush毛sha|gochanavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichanavmush毛sha|gokichanavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chanavmurosha|chanavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochanavnkmurosha|gochanavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichanavmurosha|gokichanavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chanav|chanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙n忙v|ch忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochanav|hochanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙n忙v|hoch忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochanav|hohochanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙n忙v|hohoch忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chanav|n眉chanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙n忙v|n眉ch忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chanav|n眉n眉chanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙n忙v|n眉n眉ch忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chanav|n茂chanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙n忙v|n茂ch忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chanav|n茂n茂chanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙n忙v|n茂n茂ch忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchanav|luchanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙n忙v|luch忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchanav|luluchanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙n忙v|luluch忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichanav|lichanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙n忙v|lich忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichanav|lilichanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙n忙v|lilich忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochanav|kochanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙n忙v|koch忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochanav|kokochanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙n忙v|kokoch忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechanav|kechanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙n忙v|kech忙n忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechanav|kekechanav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙n忙v|kekech忙n忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
